title: bus.bead.updated v1
description: DEPRECATED (2026-05-16, nervous-bus-immg): aspirational schema not emitted by any active producer. Metadata-change observability is provided by bd hooks directly into deer-flow; the canonical bead lifecycle bus stream is bus.bead.lifecycle.v1. Original description retained below for archival reference. — An existing bead's metadata changed — claim, status, priority, assignee, dependencies. Published by the nbd wrapper on `nbd update`. NOT fired for plain description-text edits; those are intentionally below the noise floor for this channel. The freeform `change` field is the legacy single-string descriptor the wrapper has always emitted; consumers should prefer the structured `previous_*` / `new_*` fields when present and fall back to parsing `change` otherwise.

bead_id.description: Cross-project bead id (e.g. tengine-9k2x, loom-78wk, nervous-bus-58m)

project.description: Which project's .beads/ this bead lives in (e.g. nervous-bus, hearth-loom, tengine, deer-flow). Permissive to allow new projects without a schema bump.

change.description: Short change descriptor. Wrapper conventions: 'claimed' for --claim, 'status:<value>' for --status=<value>, 'updated' for any other --<flag>. Consumers SHOULD prefer the structured fields below when set.

previous_status.description: Status before the change (open|in_progress|blocked|closed). Null when the change is not a status transition.

new_status.description: Status after the change. Null when not a status transition.

previous_assignee.description: Assignee before the change. Null when not an assignment/claim event.

new_assignee.description: Assignee after the change. For --claim events, this is the caller.

previous_priority.description: Priority before the change. Null when not a priority change.

new_priority.description: Priority after the change. Null when not a priority change.

changed_by.description: Who made the change: 'human:<name>' or 'agent:<system>:<worker>'. Matches the filer convention in bus.bead.created.

saga_id.description: Multi-bead plan correlation root (from bus.saga). Present when the update is part of a coordinated plan.
